case_title: AG WORLD TRANSPORT, INC, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ATTORNEY RECOVERY SYSTEMS, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPO ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-12-2018 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST JAMES ATTRIDGE, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-06-2018, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-22-2018. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-12-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-02-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-28-2017 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appeareance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set June 12, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
